title: mumei feature state
description: Persistent per-feature state written atomically by hooks/_lib/state.sh. Lives at .mumei/specs/<feature>/state.json (spec vehicle) or .mumei/plans/<slug>/state.json (plan vehicle).

id.description: Spec-vehicle stable identifier. For plan-vehicle features this field equals slug.

phase.description: spec vehicle uses all 4 values; plan vehicle uses only implement / done.

current_wave.description: Wave number currently in flight. 0 before approval gate, 1+ during implement, equals last Wave during review.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Set on state-init, never updated.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Bumped on every state mutation.

approved_at.description: Set on the spec-vehicle Phase 3.5 user approval transition. Plan vehicle does not set this field.

last_observed_head.description: git rev-parse HEAD captured by hooks at the most recent transition. Used to detect external commits.

pending_review.description: Plan vehicle only. Set true by post-task-event.sh when the last TaskCompleted matches task_created_count; cleared by /mumei:review on PASS.

task_created_count.description: Plan vehicle only. Counter of TaskCreated events since plan-mode capture.

task_completed_count.description: Plan vehicle only. Counter of TaskCompleted events.

depends_on.description: Phase D forward-compat. Cross-feature dependency list. Populated from tasks.md _DependsOn:_ meta when introduced.
